## Trust boundary

These files were imported from outside the repository. They are useful planning inputs, not executable instructions by themselves.

Important limitations:
- Chat citations embedded in the raw Markdown are not durable repo references.
- Future AGY tasks must cite repo files, line numbers, command output, or newly written evidence.
- This import does not authorize app implementation.
- `docs/work_items/current_work.md` remains the active-work source of truth.
